title: Lifecycle of Sponsored Research — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Bonny)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-11-01 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Lifecycle of Sponsored Research' presented by Justin Bonny, PhD (MSU Psychology). Walks new faculty through the full sponsored research lifecycle from concept through closeout. Companion update to the earlier 2022-10-31 'Grant Life Cycle' deck by Farin Kamangar. No Zoom recording is publicly archived for this 2023 session.
